# Companion — AI Lifestyle Companion

> A warm, evidence-based AI health companion for gentle weight, diabetes prevention, energy, sleep and confidence. Arabic-first, built for Egyptian women.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Today's mission, scores, tiny habit
- [Habits](/habits): Log water, steps, sleep, nutrition, movement
- [Coach](/coach): Chat with the AI health companion
- [Meal](/meal): AI meal photo reflection
- [Progress](/insights): Lifestyle score, health age, heart & diabetes prevention
